# Dear ImGui backends — place files here

This subdirectory is intentionally empty in the repo. Copy the
following files from `imgui-${VERSION}/backends/` (after extracting
the Dear ImGui release tarball) into this directory:

- imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
- imgui_impl_glfw.h
- imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp
- imgui_impl_opengl3.h
- imgui_impl_opengl3_loader.h

See `../README.md`, `../../../README.md`, and
`../../../BUILD_LINUX.md` for full instructions.
